creator: aehlig@linta.de
text:
Created attachment 178030
Patch to be applied to www/uzbl to update to 0.9.1

It seems that github changed the way they expand magic strings when creating the tar archive (the string '$Format:%D$' in misc/hash.sh). (In case someone is interested, I copied the tar archive that I originally downloaded to http://isilmar-4.linta.de/distfiles/snapshots/uzbl-uzbl-v0.9.1_GH0.tar.gz.old)

Updated the patch to the effectively re-rolled tar archive.
